3155930.name: Seed To Leaf
3155930.description:
Ginko just made the worst mistake of their life and paid dearly for it. In order to get back what they lost they will have to earn five Ember Blossom Seeds and replant the garden and connections they destroyed. But that's easier said than done when the equili - whose trust they have to earn for that - start disappearing...

Features

Explore

Icardia is a weird world! Permanent sunshine moves through months-long twilight into permanent night and energy itself has a consciousness. The people are as varied as their homes, from the Panima with their animal features to the Equili that guide the flow of life; from the coral jungle grown on top of a city to the living university in the middle of nowhere.


Transform

Ginko's arm comes with handy transformations! Unlock new plant powers by saving equili and create your own build with the equippable system.


Fight

Combine punches and Ginko's plant powers to defeat your opponents! Figure out their behavioural patterns and weaknesses to adapt your fighting style to the challenge.


Plant

Ginko's newly acquired green thumb lets them grow beautiful gardens everywhere in a matter of minutes! Choose the right combination of seeds or plant them in the right spots to cultivate healing flowers, save the game, decorate abandoned graves and so much more.


Eat

If you haven't eaten for long enough, everything looks delicious! Try tasting your way through your inventory and discover the effects of berries, balloons and bombs on your body and stats.
